stateKeys.name: attempts
stateKeys.type: integer >= 0, count of failed LIVE (non-expired) mismatches since last code issuance

dataFields.match: boolean - whether the submitted code equals the currently issued code, independent of expiry
dataFields.expired: boolean - whether the currently issued code has already expired at the moment of this check

specialRules.name: issue-resets-flow
specialRules.note: ISSUE_CODE always sets status to 'pending' and attempts to 0, regardless of prior status (no_code, pending, verified, or locked). This is the only way to unlock a locked flow.

specialRules.name: attempt-noop-unless-pending
specialRules.note: ATTEMPT has no effect (post == pre) unless status == 'pending'. In particular, attempts while 'locked', 'no_code', or 'verified' are no-ops.

specialRules.name: expired-never-verifies
specialRules.note: If expired == true, the attempt can never transition status to 'verified', even if match == true. Expiry strictly overrides a matching code.

specialRules.name: expired-does-not-count-as-failure
specialRules.note: If expired == true, attempts is NOT incremented regardless of match value, and status remains 'pending' (expiry is not evidence of user error, and never itself triggers a lock).

specialRules.name: live-mismatch-increments-attempts
specialRules.note: If expired == false and match == false, attempts is incremented by 1.

specialRules.name: live-match-verifies
specialRules.note: If expired == false and match == true, status transitions to 'verified'.

specialRules.name: lock-threshold
specialRules.note: When attempts (after incrementing on a live mismatch) reaches the fixed limit of 3, status transitions to 'locked' instead of remaining 'pending'.

specialRules.name: locked-blocks-verification
specialRules.note: Once status == 'locked', no ATTEMPT can ever produce 'verified' until a new ISSUE_CODE resets the flow.

noOpRule: An action that does not apply in the current state yields post == pre.
